args.Description: "Rewrite WelcomeWindow.tsx with retro typewriter terminal effect"

args.CodeContent:
"import { memo } from 'react' import OptimizedImage from '../Common/OptimizedImage' import styles from './WelcomeWindow.module.css' function WelcomeWindow() { const welcomeMessage = `SYSTEM BOOT COMPLETE... Welcome, Guest! I’m Anurag Tripathi — an AI Product Manager & Founder building zero-to-one LLM products. You've just logged into my interactive Retro OS. Don't just read my resume; play with the apps, explore live AI demos, and uncover the product strategies hidden in the system below. Look around... who knows what Easter eggs you might find? 🕹️✨` return (
{/* Small icon bar at the very top of content like reference */}
📁
{/* Top section: A bold text heading */}

SYSTEM OVERVIEW

{/* Image section (hero block) */}
{/* Bottom text area section */}

{welcomeMessage}

What’s inside:

🤖 AI OS ASSISTANT
Quick access chat for help and portfolio navigation.
